metadata.description: Claude Code skills: Agile planning, Databox NL→SQL & ThingWorx development

plugins.name: agile-planning
plugins.description: Agile project planning with Epic/Feature/User Story structure. Includes skills for planning, executing, testing, committing user stories, and generating QA reports.

plugins.name: databox-query
plugins.description: Interrogation NL→SQL de la base PostgreSQL Databox (ERP/CRM) en langage naturel français.

plugins.name: twx-databox
plugins.description: Développement ThingWorx assisté pour le projet DataBox. Génère des services (ThingShapes XML), dashboards (GridStack) et tiles (Grid, Synth, Metric) à partir des patterns existants. Découvre les endpoints API REST NestJS.
